ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Robert M. Lindblad, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. There being no compliance with the courts previous order, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Robert M. Lindblad, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. If no proof of service on file by the next hearing date, the case will be dismissed. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 14, 2025 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion To Reclassify The Case As An Unlimited Civil Case
Off Calendar Oct-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SARAH BURNS, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP (tel: 415-276-6500) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CASETEXT, INC.'s (INCORRECTLY NAMED AS "CASETEXT") Motion To Reclassify The Case As An Unlimited Civil Case.

Matter discussed. The Court notes the Plaintiff contested the tentative ruling. The Court notes the Plaintiff is not present. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling, as the contesting party failed to appear.

Casetext, Inc.'s unopposed motion to reclassify as unlimited civil case is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.
